description: A guardrail specification for AI coding agents that enforces explicit, two-step file deletion. It requires a non-destructive discovery phase to enumerate exact paths, followed by a fully enumerated deletion phase with no wildcards, globbing, loops, or indirect list consumption—making the blast radius visible before execution and reducing the risk of catastrophic data loss. To use this, add the markdown directly to your agent's custom instructions.
